title: The Plastic Paradox: Managing a Global Crisis
subtitle: An in-depth look at the lifecycle, environmental impact, and policy challenges of global plastic waste.
description: This series examines the complex journey of plastic from production to disposal. It provides learners with the vocabulary and context to understand international environmental policy and the circular economy.

articles.label: Part 1
articles.note: The historical expansion of plastic production and why it became a global reliance.

articles.label: Part 2
articles.note: The trade of plastic waste between developed and developing nations.

articles.label: Part 3
articles.note: How China's 2018 ban on plastic imports forced a global reckoning.

articles.label: Part 4
articles.note: The biological and social impact of microplastics and mismanagement.

articles.label: Part 5
articles.note: The future of plastic management, from global treaties to material innovation.
